allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add button input label card avatar tabs dialog dropdown-menu toast textarea select badge separator skeleton sheet scroll-area form -y)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Relaks Web App v1 - Complete app with UI redesign

Full-stack community wellness platform for adult coloring enthusiasts.
Features: auth, posts/feed, social, journal, references, AI generation,
payments \(Paystack\), notifications, and PWA support.

UI redesign: Plus Jakarta Sans font, purple/pink gradient palette,
glass morphism, Framer Motion animations, rounded-2xl components.

Tech: Next.js 16, React 19, Supabase, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add storage bucket setup SQL for Supabase

Creates posts, avatars, references, coloring-pages, and ai-generations
storage buckets with proper RLS policies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
